subcodes.first_line: O thou lover of humanity! Thy letter was received and its contents imparted spiritual significances… every great Cause in this world of existence findeth visible expression through three means
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محب نوع انسانی نامه رسید و از مضامین معانی دلنشین مفهوم گردید حمد کن خدا را
subcodes.subjects: @universal language, @teachings as spirit of the age, @unity; oneness of humanity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
